news.t: NTSX: Bringing New Efficiencies to Core Investing
Defensive ETFs Can Be a Haven in Stormy Markets
'Inflation narrative' has given rise to these specialty ETFs, market analyst says

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. Efficient Core Fund (NTSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US equities and US Treasury futures contracts. NTSX was launched on Aug 2, 2018 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: NTSX: Bringing New Efficiencies to Core Investing
data.text: Stocks and bonds are the lynchpins of core investing, but investors can face capital constraints when it comes to building efficient, diversified portfolios. In a hypothetical example, say an investor...

data.title: Defensive ETFs Can Be a Haven in Stormy Markets

data.title: 'Inflation narrative' has given rise to these specialty ETFs, market analyst says
data.text: Commodity, dividend and risk-focused exchange-traded funds are gaining traction alongside concerns around inflation, ETF Action's Mike Akins says.
